title: Sofia Counts Happy Things
synopsis: Join Sofia as she counts from one to five, discovering happy things that make her smile and feel joyful throughout her day.

pages.text: Sofia loves to count! She counts happy things that make her smile.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes sits cross-legged on a colorful rug, smiling brightly with her hands raised showing all her fingers. The number 1 appears large and decorated with rainbow patterns in the corner.

pages.text: ONE red balloon floats high. Sofia feels happy!

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes holds one bright red balloon with a big smile. The large decorative number 1 is prominently displayed with star patterns around it.

pages.text: TWO fluffy puppies wag their tails. Sofia giggles with joy!

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes sits between two adorable golden puppies, laughing as they lick her face. The large number 2 is decorated with paw print patterns.

pages.text: THREE colorful flowers smell so sweet. Sofia feels excited!

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes kneels in a garden smelling three distinct flowers - a yellow sunflower, pink rose, and purple tulip. The number 3 is decorated with petal patterns.

pages.text: FOUR yummy cookies on a plate. Sofia feels grateful!

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes sits at a small table with four chocolate chip cookies arranged on a blue plate. The number 4 is decorated with cookie patterns.

pages.text: FIVE bright stars twinkle above. Sofia feels peaceful and loved!

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes lies on soft grass looking up at five golden stars in the twilight sky, her face calm and content. The number 5 glows with starlight patterns.

pages.text: Counting happy things makes Sofia smile. One, two, three, four, five!

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes stands with arms spread wide, surrounded by all her happy things - the balloon, puppies, flowers, cookies, and stars above. Numbers 1-5 are arranged in a cheerful arc around her.
illustration.alt: Sofia surrounded by all her counted happy things

metadata.illustrationStyle: clear countable objects, fun patterns, numbers prominent, visual counting, each number unique scene, engaging practice, organized arrangement, mathematical beauty

questions.question: How many balloons does Sofia have?
questions.explanation: Sofia has one red balloon that makes her happy!

questions.question: What makes Sofia feel peaceful?
questions.explanation: The five bright stars in the sky make Sofia feel peaceful and loved!

questions.question: How many puppies play with Sofia?
questions.explanation: Two fluffy puppies wag their tails and make Sofia giggle with joy!
